query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_logs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hungerLevel IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hunger,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lissMinutes IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liss,
  SUM(CASE WHEN offPlanMeal IS NOT NULL AND offPlanMeal != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_off_plan_meal,
  SUM(CASE WHEN offPlanMeals IS NOT NULL AND offPlanMeals != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_off_plan_meals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trainingType IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_training_type
FROM daily_logs WHERE userId = 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_logs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hungerLevel IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hunger,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lissMinutes IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liss,
  SUM(CASE WHEN offPlanMeal IS NOT NULL AND offPlanMeal != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_off_plan_meal,
  SUM(CASE WHEN offPlanMeals IS NOT NULL AND offPlanMeals != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_off_plan_meals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN trainingType IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_training_type
FROM daily_logs WHERE userId = 1;
